tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — land LevelMeta.starting_abilities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make static/maze training episodes spawn the player WITH double-jump (avoid the single-jump-on-double-jump-level false-verdict bug).

**Files:** cherry-pick c830f92 0d76c7c 9e4080e 75f3778 from feature/controller-capacity; touches levels/loader.py, levels/maze.json, ai/curriculum.py, ai/trainer.py (evaluate), scenes/train.py, scenes/play.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** LevelMeta.starting_abilities exists; maze declares double_jump; static evaluate grants level starting_abilities; full suite green.

**Verify:** `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/loader.py","src/blueball/levels/maze.json","src/blueball/ai/curriculum.py","src/blueball/ai/trainer.py","src/blueball/scenes/train.py","src/blueball/scenes/play.py"], "verifyCommand": "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LevelMeta.starting_abilities exists; maze declares double_jump","static evaluate grants level starting_abilities","full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: mixed_episodes constructor + static ability grant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One constructor returning the mixed, double-jump-granted, per-episode-normalized episode list; make static evaluate() honor episode-level abilities.

**Files:** ai/episodes.py (mixed_episodes; abilities param on static_episodes), ai/trainer.py (evaluate() unions ep.abilities; evaluate_episodes static dispatch passes ep.abilities), tests/test_generalist_recipe.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** mixed_episodes returns infinite+static+gym in order; static/gym/infinite carry double_jump; static norm preserved; static evaluate honors ep.abilities; static_episodes backward-compatible.

**Verify:** `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_generalist_recipe.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/episodes.py","src/blueball/ai/trainer.py","tests/test_generalist_recipe.py"], "verifyCommand": "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_generalist_recipe.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mixed_episodes composes infinite+static+gym in order","static/gym/infinite carry double_jump","static norm preserved","static evaluate honors ep.abilities","static_episodes backward-compatible"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Warm-start genome in train()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Optionally seed the initial GA population with a known genome (Track D's mover) so gen 0 already contains a strong individual.

**Files:** ai/trainer.py (train() init_genome kwarg + seeding ~line 325), tests/test_generalist_recipe.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** init_genome seeds population[0]; init_genome=None byte-identical (seed AFTER random draw); wrong length raises ValueError; gen-0 best >= mover score.

**Verify:** `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_generalist_recipe.py -k warm_start -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/trainer.py","tests/test_generalist_recipe.py"], "verifyCommand": "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_generalist_recipe.py -k warm_start -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init_genome seeds population[0]","init_genome=None byte-identical","wrong length raises ValueError","gen-0 best >= mover score"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: train generalist CLI + config + per-kind run.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire everything into `python main.py train generalist` with mix-count config keys, generalist run-dir name, and run.json recording the mixed set + per-episode-kind scores.

**Files:** config.py (GENERALIST_* keys, distinct from Track C NET_VERSION), ai/persistence.py (run_dir_name generalist variant), cli.py (cmd_train_generalist + _per_kind_scores + subparser), tests/test_generalist_recipe.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** train generalist runs e2e writes final_best.npy + run.json; run.json has mixed set + per_kind_scores; aggregate=min default, mean_std selectable; --init warm-start + --abilities default double_jump; config keys distinct from Track C.

**Verify:** `PYTHONPATH=src python3 main.py train generalist --pop 6 --gens 2 --max-steps 300 --workers 4`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/config.py","src/blueball/ai/persistence.py","src/blueball/cli.py","tests/test_generalist_recipe.py"], "verifyCommand": "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_generalist_recipe.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["train generalist runs e2e, writes genome+run.json","run.json has mixed set + per_kind_scores","aggregate=min default, mean_std selectable","--init warm-start + --abilities default double_jump","config keys distinct from Track C"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Acceptance — backward-compat + warm-start + e2e
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock the brief's acceptance criteria with explicit tests and confirm single-mode trainers are untouched.

**Files:** tests/test_generalist_recipe.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** train infinite/levels/gym byte-identical to a pre-Track-B baseline at fixed tiny config (measure on base, then pin); warm-start gen-0 >= mover's infinite score; generalist e2e writes final_best.npy + per-kind scores; full suite green.

**Verify:** `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_generalist_recipe.py"], "verifyCommand": "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["train infinite/levels/gym byte-identical pins","warm-start gen-0 >= mover score","generalist e2e writes artifacts","full suite green"]}
```
